# ZeroTool — Free Online Developer Tools

> No sign-up, no tracking, no data sent to servers. Every tool runs 100% client-side in your browser.

ZeroTool is a collection of 15 free developer utilities built for speed and privacy. All processing happens locally in JavaScript — nothing is transmitted to any backend. Works offline once loaded.

Website: https://zerotool.dev
Languages: English (default), Chinese (/zh)

---

## JSON Formatter

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/json-formatter
Category: Data

Format, validate, and minify JSON. Paste or type JSON to pretty-print it with 2-space indentation, compress it to a single line, or validate its syntax with pinpointed error messages. Handles nested objects, arrays, and all JSON data types.

Use cases: debugging API responses, cleaning up config files, validating JSON payloads before sending.

## Base64 Encoder/Decoder

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/base64
Category: Encoding

Encode plain text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to plain text. Supports standard Base64 (RFC 4648). Useful for embedding data in URLs, email headers, JWTs, and data URIs.

Use cases: encoding binary data for transport, decoding JWT parts, creating data URIs.

## UUID Generator

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/uuid-generator
Category: Developer

Generate universally unique identifiers in v1 (timestamp-based), v4 (random), and v7 (time-ordered random) formats. Copy individual UUIDs or generate in bulk. All generation happens client-side using crypto.getRandomValues().

Use cases: database primary keys, distributed system identifiers, test data generation.

## URL Encoder/Decoder

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/url-encode
Category: Encoding

Encode special characters in URLs using percent-encoding, or decode percent-encoded strings back to readable text. Handles all reserved URI characters per RFC 3986.

Use cases: building query strings, debugging encoded URLs, preparing API parameters.

## Text Case Converter

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/text-case
Category: Text

Convert text between multiple case formats: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, and dot.case.

Use cases: variable naming convention conversion, formatting titles, code style migration.

## Markdown Preview

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/markdown-preview
Category: Text

Type or paste Markdown and see the rendered HTML output in real-time. Supports GitHub Flavored Markdown including tables, task lists, fenced code blocks, and strikethrough.

Use cases: previewing README files, drafting documentation, testing Markdown syntax.

## Color Converter

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/color-converter
Category: Developer

Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats. Pick a color visually or enter values directly. Includes a color preview swatch and copy-to-clipboard for each format.

Use cases: CSS development, design-to-code translation, color palette management.

## Regex Tester

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/regex-tester
Category: Developer

Test regular expressions against sample text with real-time match highlighting. Supports JavaScript regex flags (g, i, m, s, u). Shows match groups, indices, and capture groups.

Use cases: building and debugging regex patterns, data validation rules, text extraction patterns.

## Hash Generator

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/hash-generator
Category: Security

Generate cryptographic hashes from text input. Supports MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 via the Web Crypto API. Results displayed as hexadecimal strings.

Use cases: file integrity checks, password hashing verification, checksum comparison.

## Timestamp Converter

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/timestamp-converter
Category: Developer

Convert between Unix timestamps (seconds/milliseconds) and human-readable date formats. Shows UTC and local timezone. Supports current timestamp display and bidirectional conversion.

Use cases: debugging log timestamps, API date fields, scheduling calculations.

## JWT Decoder

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/jwt-decoder
Category: Security

Decode JSON Web Tokens without verification. Displays the header (algorithm, type) and payload (claims, expiration) in formatted JSON. Highlights expired tokens.

Use cases: debugging authentication flows, inspecting token claims, checking expiration.

## Diff Checker

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/diff-checker
Category: Text

Compare two text blocks side by side with highlighted additions, deletions, and modifications. Line-by-line comparison with color-coded output.

Use cases: code review, config file comparison, finding changes between versions.

## Password Generator

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/password-generator
Category: Security

Generate cryptographically strong random passwords with configurable length, character sets (uppercase, lowercase, digits, symbols), and exclusion rules. Uses crypto.getRandomValues() for true randomness.

Use cases: creating account passwords, generating API keys, security testing.

## QR Code Generator

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/qr-code-generator
Category: Developer

Generate QR codes from any text or URL. Customize size and download as PNG. QR codes are generated entirely in-browser.

Use cases: sharing URLs, WiFi credentials, contact information, event check-ins.

## Cron Expression Parser

URL: https://zerotool.dev/tools/cron-parser
Category: Developer

Parse standard 5-field cron expressions into plain English descriptions. Shows the next scheduled run times. Supports standard cron syntax including ranges, lists, steps, and special characters.

Use cases: verifying cron schedules, documenting scheduled jobs, debugging cron syntax.

---

## Blog

URL: https://zerotool.dev/blog

Developer guides and tutorials covering JSON formatting, Base64 encoding, regular expressions, UUID generation, and other developer topics. Available in English and Chinese.

---

## About

ZeroTool is built with Astro and deployed on Cloudflare Pages. The site is open-source and contributions are welcome.

Privacy: No cookies. No analytics tracking of tool inputs. Google Analytics 4 tracks page views only. AdSense may display ads.

Contact: https://zerotool.dev
